name: Black Spade Acquisition III Co
summary: Black Spade Acquisition III Co (BIII) is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company formed for the purpose of completing an initial business combination. The company completed its initial public offering on January 7, 2026, issuing units consisting of Class A ordinary shares and warrants. It has not yet identified or completed a business combination and operates within a defined completion window of 24-27 months from IPO closing.
